expect.note: Header-only library: tier-3 asserts gazelle_cc generated cc_library targets exist in the include tree, not test rules.

The //include/... scope contains ONLY public headers; all real test files live under tests/ which is gazelle-excluded and out of scope. No native tests are expected in scope, so this is informational only.

No native tests exist within //include/... (header-only public headers; repo's real tests are under tests/, excluded and out of scope). A worker-authored smoke test must NOT count as a native-suite pass. Honest ceiling for this approach is tier-2 (build) plus tier-3 cc_library structure; this step is informational.
